poems.title: Pasta Prelude
poems.text:
Hello angel hair,
How do you fair today, my favorite pasta man,
No acini di pepe, or tortelli (ni?)
I'm not a fagottini, or a rigatoni,
But I do know, that deep down, we are macaroni

hooks.lineFeedback: if (currentLine.length > 0 && !/\b(pasta|vermicelli|spaghetti|fettuccine|linguine|penne|rigatoni|macaroni|lasagna|ravioli|tortellini|gnocchi|orzo|farfalle|conchiglie|tagliatelle|pappardelle|bucatini|ditalini|stelline|rotini|fusilli|gemelli|campanelle|orecchiette|radiatori|cavatappi|ziti|mostaccioli|manicotti|agnolotti|cannelloni|fagottini|sacchetti|tortelli|malfatti|strozzapreti|pici|bigoli|spaghettini|capellini|angel hair|fideo|sopa seca|pastina|acini di pepe|risoni|couscous|soba|udon|ramen)\b/i.test(currentLine)) return "Line must include a pasta type"; return null;

poems.author: Torque

poems.title: Ode to Spaghet
poems.text:
The rain falls on the sidewalk in thick drops like fettuccine,
long streams criss-crossing like linguine,
it soaks into my angel hair
but i see in the distance a pasta shop there
as i walk in, the smells are a layered lasagna
the squish of macaroni sounds as good as rihanna
the ziti teenage cashier asks if i want any
but i tell him i aint got even a penne

hooks.canInsert: if (colIdx === 0 && /^[a-z]$/i.test(ch)) { return ch.toLowerCase() === 'b'; } if (colIdx === 1 && /^[a-z]$/i.test(ch)) { return ch.toLowerCase() === 'u'; } if (colIdx === 2 && /^[a-z]$/i.test(ch)) { return ch.toLowerCase() === 't'; } if (colIdx === 3 && /^[a-z]$/i.test(ch)) { return ch.toLowerCase() === 't'; } if (colIdx >= 4) { return false; } return true;
hooks.lineFeedback: var words = currentLine.split(/\s+/); for (var i = 0; i < words.length; i++) { if (words[i] !== '' && words[i] !== 'butt') { return 'Every word must be "butt"'; } } return null;

constraints.key: script:Only A's:canBreakLine=return true;;canBreakSpace=return true;;canInsert=if (/^[a-z]$/i.test(ch)) { return ch.toLowerCase() === 'a'; } return true;;lineFeedback=if (currentLine.length > 0 && /[^aA]/.test(currentLine)) { return "Only 'A' allowed"; } return null;
constraints.name: Only A's
constraints.author: Torque
